description: Complete the Employee.java class in the EmployeeModel project located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/EmployeeModel. In src/main/java/com/example/model/Employee.java, generate a constructor using all five fields (firstName, lastName, employeeId, department, salary) in their declared order, getters and setters for all fields, a toString() method using all fields, and hashCode() and equals() methods using all fields. Verify the implementation by running the project's JUnit tests and ensuring all tests pass.
